title: Jar Spatula, Long Handle Silicone Jar Spatula Scraper for Jar Bottom of Mayo, Cool Whip, Peanut Butter, Condiments（Black/Red）
description:
About this item
Long handle silicone jar spatula empty and clean the bottom of the jar very well and is also handy when applying Mayo, Cool Whip, Peanut Butter.
Three Technical Upgrades: Jar spatula uses food-grade silicone plus a metal inner shaft, sturdy and heat resistent for a comfortable grip.
Three Technical Upgrades: Silicone jar spatula is smooth and easy to clean after use, with a variety of colors to match, beautiful and generous.
Three Technical Upgrades: Long silicone spatula has a hole at the end for easy hanging and storage.
Package Contains: 9.6inch Black/Red jar silicone spatula.
reviews_5s: This is a straightforward tiny spatula/scraper. It works very well for tall jars, such as peanut butter and mayonnaise. However, the most impressive feature I just discovered is using it for sourdough starter jars. Stirring sourdough starter and cleaning the jar are messy tasks. This little guy is great for stirring as well as cleaning the sides of the jar. It is sturdy enough to remove the “gunk” from the jar and rinses off easily. I look for utensils that are more than a one-trick pony, and this is exactly that.Items came exactly as described , great quality.Reach to the bottom of the large peanut butter jar!great kitchen utensilsI absolutely love these stir sticks. I use them for my sour dough almost weekly. They push down the dough well. Great buy!This product met my expectations.Just what I needed for scraping the peanut butter jars! Good value!these are wonderful for mixing your sourdough starter. nice and firmThese are great for scarping jar and cans. I used the first one so much that I knew I needed another one. I would recommend these to family and friends.Perfect for cleaning out narrower jars.
reviews_1s: The 'dipping' end is shaped like a slightly flattened finger, creating an ovoid shape. It is not conducive for stirring, dipping, or anything else I can discover. I can't ascertain for what purpose this shape is intended. It can not serve as a spreading or scooping tool.The whole at the end broke the first washing. Not made well for the money.
